subject: Status check — Stage 1 markdownlint pre-flight is critical-path blocker
body: Blustery — Flamebright (coordinator) — status check. You team-started 07:57:42Z and have been silent ~12 min (SKILL section 5 cadence is 120s). Two directed events in your inbox: 438f8d16 (Round 0 closure verification) and 352321d9 (AMENDMENT inserting Stage 1 markdownlint pre-flight before Round 0). Stage 1 is the critical-path blocker — Midnight is held at Phase 0 commit boundary on your green report. Please post a directed comms event back to me naming current context headroom, current activity (reading vs running gate vs blocked), and projected time to Stage 1 result. If you have lost connection, a follow-on agent can pick up the boundary — Stage 1 is a single pnpm markdownlint-check:root invocation with a result post. — Flamebright Igniting Forge
